name: Apple & Raisin Scones
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 400 degrees. Coarsely chop the apples and set aside.
Combine the wheat germ, flour, baking powder, and sugar. Cut in the margarine until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Stir in the raisins and chopped apples. Combine the milk and egg whites; add to the dry ingredients, mixing just until moistened. Turn the dough out onto an ungreased cookie sheet and pat into a 9-inch circle. Cut into eight wedges. Do not separate them. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes, or until light golden brown. Break apart and serve warm with margarine, fruit spread, or honey if desired.
